title: cephaelis maranhamensis
intro: Cephaelis maranhamensis, also known as the Maranhão honeysuckle, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Cephaelis maranhamensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Cephaelis maranhamensis can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
